title: Too close for comfort ...
content:
Having 23mm (35mm equiv) lens means I have to get pretty close to the subject in order to take a photo. That is not a problem when the subject is not a live one. But when it comes to other person, I have to invade their comfort zone.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_llhrfgMBnZ1qzw4y5.jpg)

The lady in the above photo was not quite comfortable with me being in her zone. I did not have the intention to take a photo of her working. _I just wanted to take a photo of the hat she wears._

Sorry 'mam.
